app.title: Honkai Scorer
app.description: Compare and rank your favorite Honkai Star Rail characters in this strategic showdown.

startModal.title: We're about to start!
startModal.description:
The process of comparing many characters might take a while!
Don't worry, you can close the tab and come back to comparing whenever you feel like it!

errors.tooSmallPool: Character pool is too small! Please select at least 2 characters in settings.
errors.generic: An error occurred while starting the game. Please try again.

gameInProgress.title: You are currently in game!
gameInProgress.description: While a game is in progress changes to the character pool are not going to affect your current game.

warnings.progressReset: Changing character selection will reset your current progress.
warnings.resultsReset: Changing character selection will reset your current results.

start.title: Ready to Start?
start.description: Choose your preferred characters and begin the comparison!
start.progressNote: You don't need to worry about the progress of the comparison; if you haven't disabled cookies or are not using incognito mode in your browser, each step is saved in the browser itself, and you will be able to return to this page to continue the process!

smallPoolWarning.title: Small Character Pool
smallPoolWarning.description: You have selected a very small number of characters. This might result in a short game. Are you sure you want to continue?

confirmReset.title: Are you sure?
confirmReset.description:
You are about to completely reset current comparison progress!
This means, you will not be able to revert this action!

footer.builtBy: Built by a Honkai Star Rail player! The source code is available on
